comments: Old Acc. No. 8-91-14 Not accepted on initial review (Nelson 1993); reviewed again after pattern of vagrancy established in Great Plains (Leukering 2003).
citations:
Nelson, D. 1993. The C.F.O. Records Committee Report for 1991. C.F.O. Journal 27(2):49-57.

Leukering, T. 2003. Black-bellied Whistling-Duck: A wanderer rejoins the official Colorado list. Colorado Birds 37(4):202-206.
